bamboo_grove.name: Faraway Land
bamboo_grove.desc: The path is a clean, singular line cutting through the wilderness, providing a stark contrast to the chaotic, brutal geometry of the Demon Mountain ahead.

windy_peaks.name: Windy Peaks
windy_peaks.desc: A high cliffside trail swept by howling winds. More dangerous entities reside here.

demon_mount.name: Demon Mountain
demon_mount.desc: A volcanic peak covered in ash. Home to the strongest Oni.

dragon_nest.name: Dragon's Nest
dragon_nest.desc: The summit crater where the ancient Dragon Lord slumbers. The air crackles with pure energy.
